overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a top hat exploring a dimly lit gothic cathedral or castle interior. The character walks through a long corridor with arched ceilings and wall sconces before entering a grand hall with a lit fireplace and ornate furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with arched ceiling and wall sconces

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit corridor toward the stone archway at the end

entered.detail: stone ribbed vault ceiling extending down the length of the corridor
ornate wall-mounted lantern casting warm yellow light
ornate wall-mounted lantern casting warm yellow light
green stained glass window high on the corridor wall
dark wooden railing running along the left side of the corridor
dark wooden railing running along the right side of the corridor
ornate patterned carpet runner covering the floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow gothic corridor with a high arched stone ceiling. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the patterned carpet and wooden railings along the sides, while stained glass windows are visible high on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with stone columns and circular ceiling window

events.description: passes through stone archway with columns into the large grand hall
turns left and ascends the grand staircase briefly before turning back

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall and looking around at the architecture and furniture

entered.detail: large stone archway with columns marking the entrance to the hall
large circular decorative window in the ceiling
large stone fireplace with active flames visible
curved staircase with wooden railings leading upward
rectangular wooden table with decorative items

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a stone archway into a spacious grand hall with high ceilings and a circular window overhead. The room features stone columns, a large lit fireplace, and various furniture pieces. The character briefly ascends a grand staircase on the left before turning back to explore the main floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with lit fireplace and antique furniture

events.description: approaches the lit fireplace and stops to examine the mantelpiece

agents.ego_description: walking around the furniture and approaching the fireplace to examine the decorative skulls on the mantelpiece

entered.detail: carved stone mantelpiece above the fireplace
decorative animal skulls arranged on the mantelpiece

segments.scene_description: The character walks around the furniture in the grand hall, approaching the lit fireplace. The camera focuses on the stone mantelpiece decorated with animal skulls as the character stops to examine the details of the carving and the warm firelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, atmospheric gothic corridor into the expansive warmth of a grand hall. It begins by trailing a character through a stone hallway where wall sconces cast a warm glow over patterned carpets and high arched ceilings. As the character passes through a stone archway, the space opens up into a spacious hall featuring massive columns, a circular overhead window, and a grand staircase. The camera then follows the character as they navigate around ornate furniture and move toward the center of the room. Finally, the movement slows and focuses on a lit fireplace, lingering on the intricate carvings of animal skulls upon the stone mantelpiece.
